text: Third-party film transcript (markdown export) from [Scraps from the Loft](https://scrapsfromtheloft.com/movies/dune-2021-transcript/); navigation links and page footer removed here.
subject: com

text: Not an official screenplay; film © respective rights holders.
subject: film

text: Dune is an epic science fiction film directed by Denis Villeneuve, who co-wrote the screenplay with Jon Spaihts and Eric Roth.
subject: co-wrote

text: The film is based on the 1965 novel of the same name by Frank Herbert.
Release date: Dune was originally scheduled for a late 2020 release, but it was delayed due to the COVID-19 pandemic.

Release date: The film premiered at the 78th Venice International Film Festival on September 3, 2021, ahead of its international release on September 15; it was then released in United States theaters and streaming on HBO Max on October 22.
Producers: Mary Parent, Denis Villeneuve, Cale Boyter, Jon Spaihts, Patrick Walmsley, Herbert W.
subject: boyter

text: Writers: Jon Spaihts, Eric Roth, Denis Villeneuve, [Frank Herbert](https://scrapsfromtheloft.com/tag/frank-herbert/)([novel](https://scrapsfromtheloft.com/tag/dune-novel/))
subject: com

text: Cast: Timothée Chalamet as Paul Atreides, Rebecca Ferguson as Lady Jessica, Oscar Isaac as Duke Leto Atreides, Josh Brolin as Gurney Halleck, Jason Momoa as Duncan Idaho, Stellan Skarsgård as Baron Vladimir Harkonnen, Dave Bautista as Glossu Rabban, Charlotte Rampling as Gaius Helen Mohiam, Javier Bardem as Fremen Stilgar, Stephen McKinley Henderson as Thufir Hawat
subject: atreides

text: Plot: In a distant future, humanity relies on the spice melange, a precious commodity found only on the desert planet Arrakis.
subject: arrakis

text: Plot: When the Atreides family is entrusted with the stewardship of Arrakis, they soon find themselves in a conflict with the Harkonnens, their bitter rivals.
subject: arrakis

text: Plot: Paul Atreides, the young heir of the Atreides family, must embrace his destiny as the Kwisatz Haderach, a messianic figure prophesied to lead humanity to a new era.
subject: atreides

text: Dreams are messages from the deep.
subject: are

text: Rolling over the sands… you can see spice in the air.

text: [narrator over speakers] Extreme temperatures and treacherous weather events make life outside the cities of Arrakis truly hostile, with sandstorms powerful enough to cut through metal.
subject: arrakis

text: Only the native tribes known as the Fremen have adapted well enough to survive.
subject: adapted

text: Preferring to inhabit the remotest regions of Arrakis, the Fremen share the deep desert with the giant sandworms known to the Fremen as Shai-Hulud.
subject: arrakis

text: Long exposure to spice has given the tribe their characteristic blue eyes, the Eyes of Ibad.
subject: blue

text: Little else is known of the Fremen, except that they are dangerous and unreliable.
subject: are

text: Fremen attacks make spice harvesting extremely hazardous.
subject: attacks

text: For the Fremen, spice is the sacred hallucinogen which preserves life and brings enormous health benefits.

text: For the Imperium, spice is used by the navigators of the Spacing Guild to find safe paths between the stars.
subject: between

text: Without spice, interstellar travel is impossible, making it by far the most valuable substance in the universe.

text: [narrator over speakers] The largest and most dangerous organism on Arrakis is the sandworm, capable of reaching 400 meters in length.

To avoid making rhythmic noises, which attract the sandworms, the Fremen cross desert spaces using the sandwalk, a dance-like motion with irregular rhythm which emulates the natural sounds of the desert.
